ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "performance_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "review_period" TEXT /* Type of review period (e.g., Annual, Mid-Year) */,
  "environment_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Rating of the employee's satisfaction with the work environment */,
  "job_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Rating of the employee's job satisfaction */,
  "relationship_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Rating of the employee's satisfaction with relationships at work */,
  "training_opportunities_within_year" INTEGER /* Number of training opportunities available to the employee within the year */,
  "training_opportunities_taken" INTEGER /* Number of training opportunities taken by the employee within the year */,
  "work_life_balance" INTEGER /* Rating of the employee's work-life balance */,
  "self_rating" INTEGER /* Self-rating given by the employee */,
  "manager_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the manager */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Detailed comments from both the employee and the manager */,
  "goals_set" TEXT /* Goals set for the next review period */,
  "goals_achieved" TEXT /* Status of previous goals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee works in */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "manager_id" TEXT /* ID of the direct manager for the employee */,
  "location" TEXT /* Work location of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" TEXT /* ID of the manager for the department */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  "head_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the position belongs to */,
  "salary_range_min" TEXT /* Minimum salary for the position */,
  "salary_range_max" TEXT /* Maximum salary for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_opportunities" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training opportunity */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training opportunity */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the training */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the training opportunity is available */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training opportunity */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date the training was taken by the employee */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status of the training (e.g., Completed, In Progress) */,
  "certificate_earned" INTEGER /* Indicates if a certificate was earned from the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_life_balance" (
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the employee's work-life balance */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the rating was recorded */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "date_recorded")
)

CREATE TABLE "self_ratings" (
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Self-rating given by the employee */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the rating was recorded */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "date_recorded")
)

CREATE TABLE "manager_ratings" (
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the manager */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the rating was recorded */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "date_recorded")
)
